items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the outcome of the persona scenario 'Extension state isolation between businesses', but there is no direct evidence provided that confirms this functionality is implemented or tested. The linked use cases and prior steps do not include any evidence of the specific scenario being executed or validated, leading to an inconclusive status regarding the requirement's satisfaction.
